title: Conversation engagement in Brand Concierge
description: Captures metadata for a conversation session with Brand Concierge, including engagement quality, topics discussed, and conversation outcomes.

xdm:pageURL.title: Page URL
xdm:pageURL.description: The webpage where the conversation was initiated. Enables tracking of page-specific engagement and identifying high-performing content.

xdm:createdAt.title: Created At
xdm:createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the conversation started. Useful for understanding peak engagement times.

xdm:durationInSeconds.title: Duration
xdm:durationInSeconds.description: Total conversation duration in seconds. Quantifies engagement depth and helps prioritize high-engagement leads.

xdm:conversationStatus.title: Conversation Status
xdm:conversationStatus.description: Whether the conversation was initiated, dropped, or completed. Helps in identifying drop-off points and optimizing interactions.

xdm:conversationTranscript.title: Conversation Transcript
xdm:conversationTranscript.description: URL link to the full transcript of the conversation. Enables sales reps to review past interactions for better follow-ups.

xdm:summary.title: Conversation Summary
xdm:summary.description: AI-generated summary of key discussion points. Saves sales reps time by highlighting important details quickly.

xdm:discussedTopics.title: Topics Discussed
xdm:discussedTopics.description: Key topics extracted from the conversation (e.g., pricing, demo request, product features). Enables segmentation, nurturing, and intent-based scoring.

xdm:productsOrServices.title: Products or Services
xdm:productsOrServices.description: Products or services discussed during the conversation. Helps align follow-up content and sales pitches to customer interest.

xdm:engagementScore.title: Engagement Score
xdm:engagementScore.description: A numerical score from 0 to 100 representing engagement or lead quality based on conversation depth, duration, and intent signals.

xdm:language.title: Language
xdm:language.description: The language in which the conversation took place, typically as a BCP 47 language tag. Enables localized engagement and personalization.

xdm:chatTranscript.title: Chat Transcript
xdm:chatTranscript.description: URL link to the full transcript of the chat conversation. Enables sales reps to review past interactions; marketers can analyze chat patterns.
